nasb.text: “Because you did not serve the Lord your God with joy and a glad heart, for the abundance of all things;

esv.text: Because you did not serve the Lord your God with joyfulness and gladness of heart, because of the abundance of all things,

cnv.text: 因為你在這樣富足的時候，沒有以歡樂和高興的心來事奉耶和華你的　神，

ccb.text: 如果你们在富足时不心甘情愿地事奉你们的上帝耶和华，
